spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates text-fit: balance effectively, showing how short quotes grow and long quotes shrink to fit the editorial column.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactivity with a width slider, CSS resizable frame, quote length switcher, and a live toggle to compare with/without text-fit.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb matches the pull quote scaler concept of column-filling text.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers multiple quote lengths (short to very long) and allows direct comparison of the layout with the feature disabled.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link in the see also section.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the editorial print design system, using CSS variables for colors and borders.

openQuestions.title: Add dynamic feature detection
openQuestions.detail: Similar to the Logo Lockup demo, adding a dynamic support check using `CSS.supports('text-fit', 'balance')` would improve the user experience by explicitly telling them if their current browser supports the feature, rather than just having a static note.

summary: A high-quality interactive demo that perfectly demonstrates the editorial use case of text-fit: balance. The ability to toggle the feature on/off and switch between different quote lengths makes it very educational, though it could benefit from dynamic feature detection.
